title: Daily journal frontmatter
_comment: Schema for files in 📓 Journals/. journal-index.json builder + insights skill both depend on these fields. Malformed YAML silently drops the entry. Extended with the cross-type frontmatter contract (provenance, confidence, freshness_days, last_verified, source_count, memory_class, entity_ids) shared across all 8 typed memory primitives. memory_class default for journal is episodic. entity_ids cross-source linking (slack, github_pr, github_issue, jira, notion, gmail, linear).

floor.description: Floor framework level: numeric 1-34, a named floor, or an array of 1-3 named floors for elevator emotions (e.g. [Gratitude, Excitement]) — first element is dominant. Matches daily-journal SKILL.md, which instructs the array form for dual/elevator floors.

provenance.description: List of independent sources that back this entry.

confidence.description: How sure the system is the entry is accurate, 0.0 to 1.0.

freshness_days.description: How many days the entry stays fresh before re-verification is recommended.

last_verified.description: ISO 8601 date when the entry was last confirmed.

source_count.description: How many independent sources back this entry.

memory_class.description: Episodic captures one-time events; procedural captures repeatable, time-stable knowledge. Default for journal is episodic.

entity_ids.description: Cross-source identifiers. Keys: slack, github_pr, github_issue, jira, notion, gmail, linear. Values: source-system IDs.
